title: 🛑 Break Bad Habits with Mindful Intercepts! 🧠
message: Do you open distracting apps purely out of muscle memory? We've added a powerful new tool to act as your personal focus coach and break the dopamine loop. ✨
points: 🧠 Mindful Intercepts: Add healthy friction to distracting apps to force a conscious pause before opening them.
🚧 4 Custom Friction Modes: Choose between a calming 5-Second Delay, a Random PIN, Conscious Phrase typing, or a Tap Challenge.
🛠️ Standalone Toggles: Easily configure friction for any specific app instantly from the new Mindful Intercepts settings menu.
⚡ UX Improvements: Smoother keyboard handling during searches and highly optimized battery usage under the hood.

title: ✨ The Update Hub is Here! 🚀
message: We've crafted a beautiful new way to keep you perfectly in sync with our latest productivity tools and features. 🌿
points: 🔔 New In-App Updater: Get instantly notified about fresh features directly from your home screen.
📖 Interactive Changelogs: Discover exactly what's new the moment you update your app.
🔄 Manual Check: Instantly check for new updates anytime with our new quick-action button.
⚡ Performance Boost: Under-the-hood tweaks for an even smoother, distraction-free experience.
